# Folder (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry Folder.

```terraform
data "foundry_folder" "example" {
  rid = "ri.compass.main.folder.example-folder-rid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `rid` (String) RID of the Folder. (Required for data source lookup.)

### Read-Only

- `created_by` (String) The ID of the user who created the Folder.
- `created_time` (String) The time at which the Folder was created.
- `display_name` (String) Display name of the Folder.
- `parent_folder_rid` (String) RID of the parent Folder. For resources, this should be the RID of a project or another folder. For datasources of projects or spaces, this may be a space RID.
- `path` (String) The full path to the Folder.
- `trash_status` (String) Current trash status of the Folder.
- `updated_by` (String) The ID of the user who last updated the Folder.
- `updated_time` (String) The time at which the Folder was most recently updated.
